title: genista pulchella subsp. villarsiana
intro: Genista pulchella subsp. villarsiana, also known as the French broom, is a flowering plant in the pea family Fabaceae. The French broom is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to aid in digestion and reduce inflammation, due to its high content of saponins and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Genista pulchella subsp. villarsiana include its potential to lower cholesterol levels, improve cardiovascular health, and have antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of the French broom can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, often used to treat digestive issues and promote overall well-being.
